profile.name: Adrian Aguirre
profile.title: Self-Taught Developer
profile.description: Specialized in digital transformation through data analysis and automation. With a Bachelor's degree in Administrative Engineering and over 6 years of experience, excels in promoting operational efficiency and innovation. Passionate about programming, continuously exploring new languages to enhance skills in software development.

experience.company: Superintendencia Nacional de Migraciones Perú · Full-Time
experience.description: Created and maintained dashboards using POWERBI, Excel, and other statistical software, optimized production processes, prepared statistical reports, managed administrative aspects, handled resource requests, and provided IT support.

experience.company: Segurinvest Corredores de Seguros SAC · Full-Time
experience.description: Implemented business intelligence procedures, provided administrative support to sales promoters, offered exceptional customer service, handled insurance quotations and processes, managed data entry, and generated commission settlements.

Issued and renewed insurance contracts, controlled and sent policies, participated in post-sale activities, identified areas for process improvement, managed guarantees, and handled policy and invoice records.

experience.company: La Positiva Vida Seguros y Reaseguros · Full-Time
experience.description: Provided customer support, collected and reported policy data, handled the issuance and endorsement of life insurance policies, generated policy modifications, prepared policy packages, and managed policy service requests.
Managed customer accounts, facilitated payment agreements, contributed to re-invoicing processes, and supported the sale of new products and services, always providing high-quality service.

education.degree: Specialization in Python for Data Analysis

education.school: Universidad Inca Garcilaso de la Vega

education.degree: Specialization in Risk Management and Insurance
